author: aidantilgner
description: In place autogeneration of content based on prompts within notes

manifest.author: Aidan Tilgner
manifest.description: In place autogeneration of content based on prompts.
manifest.name: Autogen

name: Autogen

releases.author: AidanTilgner
releases.description: This release adds support for the "Custom URL" setting, which allows use of custom models which implement the OpenAI API spec. You can just leave this field blank and ignore it if you plan on continuing to use OpenAI's API for completions.

releases.author: AidanTilgner
releases.description:
Addressed the following feedback:

> [Copyright (c) [year] [fullname]](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/LICENSE.md#L3)
Fill this

> [.modal-button-container {](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/styles.css#L9)
Please don't overwrite core styling in a plugin, add another class so it only applies to your plugin.

> [typingTimeout: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/main.ts#L47)
use a regular number here, or just remove that line since it is not used.

> [label: "Get Suggestions",](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/main.ts#L199), [.setName("Trigger Regex")](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/main.ts#L373), [.setName("Window Size")](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/main.ts#L386), [.setName("System Prompt")](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/main.ts#L401)
[Use sentence case in UI](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Use+sentence+case+in+UI)

> [console.log("Dangerously allowing browser");](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/e88b2a9f1ddcb3c43d6430b3596b7af720cccb1c/utils/openai.ts#L5)
Please avoid unnecessary logging. If you need it for debugging purposes, add a check to only log during development.

releases.author: AidanTilgner
releases.description:
Fixed issue from ObisidanReviewBot:

> [[1](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/70da7cafeb4e9494b08b9440e6f612316ade8aee/main.ts#L417)][[2](https://github.com/AidanTilgner/AutogenObsidianPlugin/blob/70da7cafeb4e9494b08b9440e6f612316ade8aee/main.ts#L418)]:You should avoid assigning styles via JavaScript or in HTML and instead move all these styles into CSS so that they are more easily adaptable by themes and snippets.

Now `styles.css` is used and holds this value.

releases.author: AidanTilgner
releases.description:
UX improvements and overhaul.

- Press enter to generate instead of typing timeout
- Customize system prompt

releases.author: AidanTilgner
releases.description: This is the initial release! The plugin has been tested and works as shown with the default settings.
